llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Deputy Manager - Sales, Surface Treatment, Coatings
job.description: OBJECTIVES THE POSITION Manage sales of surface treatment business unit under the Chemetall® brand via direct and indirect distribution in assigned northern territories of VN aiming to generate sustainable sales growth for G-ECT SEA. Identify and exploit market potential as well as to explore and create customer needs to ensure profitable sales growth by new and existing technologies in new and existing customers. Take full sales responsibility for Northern Territories, the Sales Manager coordinates Surface Treatment activities for Industry and Automotive (OEM/Component Activities) and thereby acts as single point of contact (SPOC) for Segment Management APAC and Business Management SEA. MAIN AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITIES AND KEY ACTIVITIES Sales Management and Development: Explore and develop new business by high market presence in the field to ensure sustainable growth. Prepare, negotiate, and conclude business contracts and maintain business growth with customers. Ensure relationship management w/ all levels of seniority of customer organization (esp. key decider). Coordinate launch of new products at key customers aligned with Business Management and Marketing Provide trainings and share know-how with customers and distribution partners to ensure that the full potential and advantages of G-ECT’s products and process solutions are being materialized. Maintain and manage sales opportunities, leads, and visit reports maintained in Salesforce CRM tool. Ensure accurate demand forecasting as basis for stock planning to secure reliable supply to Vietnam. Ensure “on time response” related to commercial, quality, and technical inquiries / issues of customers. Achieve net sales / profitability budgets and implement pricing measures timely and efficiently. Market Intelligence: Explore and exploit customer needs, industry trends and drivers, unique selling proposition to recommend the best solution(s), leading to the achievement of value creation for the customers and BASF (by Chemetall Process /Solution Selling approach). Conduct studies and analyze market trends, competitors, product applications, processes and technology and develop related marketing / selling strategies for VN market. Cooperate with G-ECT SEA Business and Marketing as well as APAC Segment Management to develop a strategic growth roadmap for the assigned sales segments in Vietnam. Technical Service / Consultancy: Ensure technical consultancy and support to customers on product applications,...
